#  Add a Related Item to a Drawing 
##  Things to Consider​ 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' permissions on the project's Drawings tool.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Drawings tool will be able to view the title of the related item.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The drawing must be published in order to add a related item. See [Publish Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/user-guide-bidding-and-estimating-integration/publish-drawings).
    * For an item category to appear in the drop-down menu for the 'Type' column, the corresponding tool must be active on the project. See [Add and Remove Tools from a Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/add-and-remove-project-tools).
    * For an item to appear in the drop-down menu for the 'Description' column, you must have the appropriate permission to view that item in the corresponding Procore tool.
    * If you want to link items to a markup on the drawing itself, see [Link Items on a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/link-items-on-a-drawing).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.  
_Note:_ If your project uses [Drawing Areas](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-drawing-areas), select the drawing area you want to open.
  2. Click **Info** on the drawing you want to add an item to.
  3. Click the **Related** **Items** tab.
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Complete the following:
     * **Type**. Select the type of item from the list.
     * **Description**. Select the item you want to add as a related item.
     * **Date**. The system automatically fills the date with the date the item was added to Procore. If there is no date associated with the item, the date field will remain blank.
     * **Notes**. Add notes to clarify how the item is related to the drawing.
  6. Click **Add**.   
![Drawings Add Related](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1774b3c46a9c029ae465d5921809775d/1d7c3920299857c299ca9c5b750f5063/drawings-add-related.png?fm=webp)
  7. _Optional:_ Add additional related items as needed.
  8. Click **Save**.  
The related item will be shown with a direct link to the item.


## See Also
  * [Link Items on a Drawing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/link-items-on-a-drawing)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [What are "related items" in Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-related-items-in-procore)
title: Add a Related Item to a Drawing
description: How to add a related item to a drawing's 'Related Items' tab in the project's Drawings tool.
